Event: Titanic Excavation - Apr 16 2026
Event Date: 16/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI320
Cave Sign Ring

Once in a while, the unit removes all positive effects from 3 random enemy units, deals 750000 pure damage to the targets, and starts incinerating them. The enemy units being incinerated start receiving 200000 pure damage every second for 4 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the incinerated units receive pure damage equal to 75% of the damage received by the original targets. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 4 sec. When casting incineration, the ring's wearer also sets all enemy units in a small radius around the incinerated targets on fire. A burning unit receives 500000 magic damage, and their healing rate is reduced by 40% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
